The '''''Ryloth''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of the New Republic fleet during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]]. Along with the [[Devonian]], the ship was dispatched by Ackbar to rescue any survivors on a crippled [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun]].

It also joined the task force commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] during the [[Battle of Ciutric]]. It was presumably named after [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].
